consent.banner: Just a mirror, not a verdict. There's no right answer and nothing is stored or tied to you.
consent.footer: For curiosity, not diagnosis. Every one of these has a flip side, and you can land on either.

markers.name: Force of habit
markers.short: You do it before you decide to. The phone, the snack, the same reply. Pure autopilot.
markers.interpretation: A groove worn so deep you don't feel yourself fall in. Most of the day runs on it.

inverse.name: Look before you leap
inverse.short: You check the drop before you jump. A beat of thought before the move.

markers.name: The grass is always greener
markers.short: Everyone else's life looks better from where you're standing. Yours comes up short.
markers.interpretation: The oldest trap there is, and the feed made it a 24/7 thing: your ordinary Tuesday against everyone's highlight reel.

inverse.name: Count your blessings
inverse.short: You look at what you've actually got, and it's usually more than you thought.

markers.name: Keeping up with the Joneses
markers.short: You measure your worth by what the people around you have and do.
markers.interpretation: Status is a moving target. The second you catch up, the finish line moves again.

inverse.name: March to your own beat
inverse.short: You set your own pace and don't much care who's watching.

markers.name: Tomorrow never comes
markers.short: You'll start Monday. Then next Monday. The plan is always one day out.
markers.interpretation: Putting it off feels like rest, but it just hands the weight to a version of you that hasn't shown up yet.

inverse.name: No time like the present
inverse.short: You start now, small and imperfect, because now is the only time you actually have.

markers.name: Sweep it under the rug
markers.short: If you don't look at it, maybe it isn't there. You bury the hard thing and scroll past.
markers.interpretation: Avoidance buys ten quiet minutes and charges interest. The pile under the rug only grows.

inverse.name: Face the music
inverse.short: You turn toward the hard thing and deal with it while it's still small.

markers.name: Better safe than sorry
markers.short: You'd rather protect what you have than risk it for what you could get.
markers.interpretation: Caution keeps you whole and keeps you small. The safe road rarely goes anywhere new.

inverse.name: Nothing ventured, nothing gained
inverse.short: You take the swing, because the only guaranteed loss is the shot you never take.

markers.name: Bottling it up
markers.short: You keep it in, cork it tight, and tell everyone you're fine.
markers.interpretation: Feelings don't evaporate when you cap them. They build pressure until something pops.

inverse.name: Wear your heart on your sleeve
inverse.short: You show what you feel as you feel it. Nothing to guess, nothing to leak.

markers.name: Everything in moderation
markers.short: A little of this, a little of that. You keep the dial in the middle.
markers.interpretation: Balance keeps you steady, but the middle rarely makes history. Some things deserve the whole heart.

inverse.name: Go big or go home
inverse.short: You pour it all in or you don't bother. Half-measures aren't your thing.

markers.name: Birds of a feather flock together
markers.short: You gravitate to people who think, talk, and move like you.
markers.interpretation: Same-minded company feels like home, but an echo chamber is still a cage with nice wallpaper.

inverse.name: Opposites attract
inverse.short: You're drawn to what you're not, the people who stretch you instead of mirror you.
